translations.landing.languagepacks.available.subtitle: Download and install offline language packs
translations.landing.languagepacks.available.title: Available Language Packs
translations.landing.languagepacks.help.desc: Flyto2 is translated by the community. If you'd like to help improve translations or add a new language, visit our GitHub repository.
translations.landing.languagepacks.help.title: Help Us Translate
translations.landing.languagepacks.hero.description: Download translation files for offline use in Flyto2
translations.landing.languagepacks.hero.title: Language Packs
translations.landing.languagepacks.howto.step4: Click "Import Language Pack" and select the file
translations.landing.languagepacks.howto.title: How to Install
translations.landing.languagepacks.request.subtitle: Don't see your language? Let us know!
translations.landing.languagepacks.request.title: Request a Language
translations.landing.languagepacks.what.desc: Language packs translate the entire Flyto2 interface into your language. Menus, buttons, messages, and help text — everything changes to your preferred language.
translations.landing.languagepacks.what.title: What Are Language Packs?
